metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_4705
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Both chemical inhibition of MLCK (MYLK) and down-regulation of MLCK with shRNAs impaired endocytosis following action potentials delivered at 5-40 Hz (Figures 1 and 4), whereas MLCK down-regulation did not change Ca2+channel current in the soma or vesicle exocytosis at boutons (Figure 5). Acute inhibition of myosin II similarly impaired endocytosis (Figure 6). Authors conclude that MLCK regulates endocytosis by functioning between Ca2+/calmodulin and Myosin.. Experimental description: M&M: "Dissociated culture of rat hippocampal neurons was prepared"

For experiments on MLCK downregulation, we used two shRNA sequences (shMLCK 1: 5'-GCTAGATTTGACTGCAAGATT-3'; and shMLCK 2: 5'-ACTGTCCTCTATGGCAATGAT-3') previously reported against rat MLCK (Leitman et al., 2011) and a scrambled shRNA sequence (scrambled: 5'-GCGAAAGATGATAAGCTAA-3') as the control (Pasque et al., 2011).
